requirement: Policies, processes, procedures and practices for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Accountability structures empower appropriate teams and individuals for AI risk management.
Organizational culture considers and communicates AI risk.
Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers AI risk.
Senior leadership and board members understand and contribute to AI risk management.
Policies address AI risks from third-party software, data, and supply chain.
Context established for AI system risks through understanding of intended purpose, impacts, and deployment context.
Scientific findings and organizational practices integrated to characterize AI risks.
integration_sub: Adversarial Threat Modeling for Agentic Systems

requirement: AI risks and benefits mapped and prioritized by likelihood and magnitude of impact.
Risks and benefits understood by the organization and relevant AI actors.
Practices and personnel for supporting AI risk identification are in place.
AI risk measurement approaches are identified and applied.
AI system evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
AI system performance or assurance criteria are measured.
Feedback about efficacy of measurement incorporated into organizational processes.
A plan for managing AI risks is developed, monitored, and in place.
Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, implemented, and documented.
AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.
Risk treatments including response, recovery, and communication plans are put in place.
Policies address GenAI-specific risks: hallucination, data provenance, and synthetic content.
Agentic AI risks including prompt injection, tool misuse, and autonomous action boundaries are identified.
GenAI outputs evaluated for accuracy, bias, toxicity, and alignment with intended use.
Human oversight mechanisms in place for high-stakes agentic decisions.
integration_sub: Human Approval Gates in Agentic Workflows

requirement: High-risk AI systems must implement a risk management system throughout the lifecycle (Art. 9).
High-risk AI systems must use high-quality data with appropriate data governance (Art. 10).
High-risk AI systems must maintain technical documentation sufficient to assess compliance (Art. 11).
High-risk AI systems must enable logging of events throughout operation (Art. 12).
High-risk AI systems must be transparent and provide information to deployers (Art. 13).
High-risk AI systems must allow effective human oversight including ability to intervene and override (Art. 14).
High-risk AI systems must achieve appropriate accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity (Art. 15).
GPAI model providers must maintain technical documentation and comply with copyright law (Art. 53).
GPAI models with systemic risk must perform adversarial testing and incident reporting (Art. 55).
LLM01 Prompt Injection: Attackers manipulate LLMs via crafted inputs to cause unintended actions.
LLM02 Sensitive Information Disclosure: LLMs may reveal confidential data in responses.
LLM03 Supply Chain Vulnerabilities: LLM pipelines depend on third-party components with potential vulnerabilities.
LLM04 Data and Model Poisoning: Training data or model weights manipulated to introduce vulnerabilities.
LLM05 Improper Output Handling: Insufficient validation of LLM outputs before passing to downstream systems.
integration_sub: Output Schema Validation & Downstream Integration Guards

requirement: LLM06 Excessive Agency: LLM agents granted excessive permissions or autonomy beyond what is needed.
LLM07 System Prompt Leakage: System prompts containing sensitive instructions are exposed.
LLM08 Vector and Embedding Weaknesses: Vulnerabilities in vector stores and embedding pipelines.
integration_sub: Vector Store Access Controls & Embedding Validation

requirement: LLM09 Misinformation: LLMs produce factually incorrect content presented as authoritative.
LLM10 Unbounded Consumption: LLM applications vulnerable to resource exhaustion and denial-of-service.
integration_sub: Rate Limiting, Quotas & Cost Controls Architecture
